name: team_task_get_children
description: Retrieve the direct child tasks of a given parent task. Use this to inspect the immediate subtasks of a work item without fetching the entire subtree. Useful for reviewing task breakdowns and checking progress on decomposed work.

task_id.description: Unique identifier of the parent task whose children to retrieve

limit.description: Maximum number of child tasks to return

offset.description: Number of child tasks to skip for pagination

examples.name: Get children of a top-level task
